    • AriaConfig

    Interface AriaConfig

    interface AriaConfig {
        ariaChecked: boolean;
        ariaCurrent: boolean;
        ariaCurrentToken:
            | "step"
            | "false"
            | "true"
            | "location"
            | "time"
            | "date"
            | "page";
        ariaDisabled: boolean;
        ariaHidden: boolean;
        ariaInvalid: boolean;
        ariaReadonly: boolean;
        ariaRequired: boolean;
        ariaValue: boolean;
        bindKeydown: boolean;
        bindRoleForClick: boolean;
        bindRoleForState: boolean;
        diagnostics: boolean;
        tabindex: boolean;
    }
